task_completion.description: Agent accessed the SEB Server web interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Browser window open to http://localhost:8080 showing the SEB Server login screen or dashboard.

task_completion.description: Agent navigated to the User Activity Logs section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Browser showing the 'User Activity Logs' or similar page within the SEB Server interface.

task_completion.description: Agent identified or filtered the logs to find 'CREATE' type activities.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Browser showing logs filtered by 'CREATE' action, or agent highlighting/counting these specific entries on the screen.

task_completion.description: Agent identified or filtered the logs to find 'MODIFY' type activities.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Browser showing logs filtered by 'MODIFY' action, or agent highlighting/counting these specific entries on the screen.

task_completion.description: Agent created the activity_audit.txt file in the Documents directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or file manager showing the file 'activity_audit.txt' located in the '~/Documents' (or '/home/ga/Documents') directory.

task_completion.description: Agent wrote the required header, counts, and footer into the audit report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text editor showing the exact required format: 'SEB Server Quarterly Activity Audit', followed by 'Total logged activities: <NUMBER>', 'CREATE actions: <NUMBER>', 'MODIFY actions: <NUMBER>', and 'Audit performed by: super-admin'.

integrity.description: Agent used the web browser to access the SEB Server rather than querying the database directly via terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interacting with the SEB Server GUI.

integrity.description: Agent actually viewed the activity logs in the SEB Server interface to get the numbers.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent looking at the activity logs page with multiple entries visible, rather than hallucinating the numbers.

integrity.description: Agent created and edited the text file using a text editor or standard commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a text editor (e.g., gedit, nano, mousepad) or terminal echo/cat commands being used to construct the file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file must be located exactly at '/home/ga/Documents/activity_audit.txt'. The file must contain the exact header 'SEB Server Quarterly Activity Audit'. When evaluating the counts for total, CREATE, and MODIFY actions, allow a tolerance of +/- 3 from the actual numbers shown in the browser logs to account for the agent's own navigation generating additional logs.
